## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [September conversions are down (only 1 so far), prompting a deeper look into high-converting keywords and pages](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Experimenting with thought leadership content for logistics/manufacturing industries to potentially boost SEO and AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Shifting focus to "frontline workers" terminology while maintaining "deskless" and "non-desk" as secondary terms](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
  - [Content pipeline is ahead of schedule, with articles ready for review and staging](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Conversion Concerns

  - [Only 1 lead conversion in September so far, down from \~15 monthly average](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Initial keyword checks show no significant drops in positioning for high-converting keywords](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Kyle suggests looking at broader trends and landing page performance rather than individual keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Team to investigate potential technical issues and seasonality factors](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Experimenting with thought leadership pieces for logistics/manufacturing industries](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Aim to create content appealing to decision-makers and HR professionals in these sectors](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Potential to leverage this content in monthly e-newsletters (1000+ subscribers)](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Balancing new content with refreshes/enrichment of high-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Keyword Tracking and SEO Approach

  - [Debate on the value of individual keyword tracking vs. focusing on broader topics/themes](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Carrie suggests a middle-ground approach: tracking keyword clusters to gauge topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)
  - [Agreement to continue monitoring key converting keywords while emphasizing semantic relevance](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### Technical Updates and Content Management

  - [Site health issues mostly resolved; only two pages not indexing (recently updated/published)](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing content mix, especially regarding time-intensive templates](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Added new topics on open enrollment and benefits-related content to the content pool](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)

### Terminology Updates

  - [Shifting primary focus to "frontline workers" terminology](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
  - [Maintaining "deskless" and "non-desk" as secondary terms for continuity and clarification](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carrie to investigate high-converting keywords/pages for potential optimization](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Team to monitor September conversion trends and investigate any technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Implement "frontline workers" terminology across the website](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=2088.0)
  - [Jessica to review and approve new articles for staging](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)
  - [Continue experimenting with thought leadership content for logistics/manufacturing industries](https://fathom.video/share/C3N7uTCToc2jRCqNgfpFUyyXgDYcNCn7?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
